name: cc-dev-kit
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace: a stack-agnostic dev-workflow (agents + skills, with on-demand stack packs like the Laravel skill) plus meta tooling for authoring agents and skills. Nothing hardcodes a project — agents learn each repo's conventions at runtime.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic dev workflow: architect / feature-builder / senior-developer / code-reviewer agents, plus skills for feature-flow orchestration, test-first TDD, commit / pr git, and a `laravel` stack pack the agents pull in on demand. The agents learn each project's conventions at runtime by reading its CLAUDE.md and sibling files — no hardcoded paths or framework.

plugins.name: meta-workflow
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring Claude Code assets. The agent-skill-reviewer agent reviews subagent / skill definition files (.claude/agents/<name>.md, SKILL.md) for trigger quality, internal coherence, and routing overlap — read-only, returns a report. Complements dev-workflow, which targets application code.
